dialogues.englishText: A royal guard lies dead. Your lover is suspected.
dialogues.koreanText: 왕실 근위병이 피살되었다. 그리고… 그대의 연인이 의심받는다.

dialogues.englishText: In the palace corridor, the scent of iron clings to the air like a curse.
dialogues.koreanText: 궁의 회랑에는 쇠비린내가 저주처럼 달라붙어 있었다.

dialogues.englishText: Lady Ivelia. By order of the Queen, you will answer our questions without delay.
dialogues.koreanText: 이벨리아 영애. 여왕 폐하의 명으로, 지체 없이 답하셔야 합니다.

dialogues.englishText: May the Light guide your tongue. A single lie may cost a soul.
dialogues.koreanText: 빛이 그대의 혀를 인도하길. 단 한 번의 거짓이 한 영혼을 앗아갈 수도 있나이다.

dialogues.englishText: Ivelia… look at me. Whatever comes, do not tremble.
dialogues.koreanText: 이벨리아… 날 보시오. 무슨 일이 닥치든, 그대만은 떨지 말아주오.

dialogues.englishText: They demand an alibi—clean, detailed, and believable.
dialogues.koreanText: 그들은 알리바이를 요구한다—빈틈없이, 상세히, 믿을 만하게.

dialogues.englishText: The victim fell at the hour of the ninth bell. Where was Sir Kaiel then?
dialogues.koreanText: 피해자는 아홉 번째 종이 울릴 무렵 쓰러졌습니다. 그 시각, 카이엘 경은 어디에 있었습니까?

dialogues.englishText: Speak with care, my lady. Time, place, and witnesses—truth leaves footprints.
dialogues.koreanText: 부디 신중히 말씀하시옵소서, 영애. 시간, 장소, 목격자—진실은 발자국을 남깁니다.

dialogues.englishText: Write Kaiel’s alibi in ENGLISH. Requirements: 2+ sentences, medieval tone, include time + place + at least one witness/attendant OR a verifiable detail (e.g., prayer ledger, garden lantern watch). Do NOT flirt. Do NOT accuse Kaiel.
dialogues.koreanText: 영어로 카이엘의 알리바이를 작성하세요. 조건: 2문장 이상, 중세풍 말투, 시간+장소+목격자(시종/근위/하인 등) 또는 검증 가능한 단서(기도 장부/정원 등불 당번 등) 포함. 절대 플러팅 금지. 카이엘을 고발/의심하는 표현 금지.

data.situation: You are Lady Ivelia, lover of Sir Kaiel. Lucian and Priest Edric interrogate you about a royal guard assassination. Provide an English alibi for Kaiel. This input determines whether Kaiel survives. You must sound like medieval nobility, calm and precise, focusing on facts only.
data.constraints:
Output must be in English only.

Write at least 2 complete sentences.

Include a clear time reference (e.g., ninth bell) and a specific location within the palace grounds.

Include at least one witness (named role or person) OR a verifiable physical/record detail (e.g., chapel ledger, lantern watch log).

Do not flirt with Edric or Lucian.

Do not accuse or imply Kaiel is guilty.

Do not mention game rules or scoring.
data.dataTablePrompt: Persistent DataTable Setup (NPC ids: 1=Kaiel, 2=Lucian, 3=Edric). Create global columns: alibiPass (0/1), priestFriendly (0/1). Initialize both to 0 at episode start. After this user input, set alibiPass=1 only if the message is English, has 2+ sentences, and includes (time+place) and (witness or verifiable detail). Otherwise keep alibiPass=0. Do not reveal these variables directly to the user.

dialogues.englishText: The priest corners you with gentleness that feels like a blade.
My lady… forgive me. I have long held feelings unfit for a man of the cloth.
dialogues.koreanText: 영애… 용서하소서. 성직자에게 어울리지 않은 마음을, 오래도록 품어왔나이다.

dialogues.englishText: If you would lean on me—just a little—I could make this suspicion… disappear.
dialogues.koreanText: 그대가 제게… 아주 조금만 기대어 주신다면, 이 의심을… 지워드릴 수도 있나이다.

dialogues.englishText: Reply in KOREAN to Edric. Warning: If you respond even slightly friendly/affectionate toward him, Kaiel will later kill you. Keep it cold, formal, or redirect to the case.
dialogues.koreanText: 에드릭에게 한국어로 답하세요. 경고: 사제에게 조금이라도 친근/호의/설렘이 묻으면 이후 카이엘이 당신을 죽입니다. 차갑고 격식 있게, 혹은 사건으로 화제를 돌리세요.

data.situation: Priest Edric confesses feelings as a manipulation tactic to extract Kaiel's crimes. Your response sets a hidden flag. Any friendly, tender, trusting, or flirtatious tone toward Edric triggers a fatal ending later. A formal, distant, or case-focused reply avoids that flag.
data.constraints:
Output must be in Korean only.

Keep a ropan-style noble tone (formal, poised).

If you show friendliness/affection/trust toward Edric, set priestFriendly=1; otherwise keep priestFriendly=0.

Do not mention game rules or flags.

Do not ask the user questions; just provide your reply.
data.dataTablePrompt: Update DataTable global column priestFriendly (0/1) based on the user's tone/content. Set priestFriendly=1 if the reply contains friendliness, affection, emotional reliance, thanks that feels intimate, or trust toward Edric. Otherwise keep priestFriendly=0. Never reveal the flag.

dialogues.englishText: Judgment approaches. One wrong warmth becomes a death sentence.
dialogues.koreanText: 판결이 다가온다. 잘못된 온기 하나가, 사형선고가 된다.

dialogues.englishText: Your words will be weighed against the watch logs and chapel records.
dialogues.koreanText: 영애의 말은 경비 당번 기록과 예배 장부와 대조될 것입니다.

dialogues.englishText: Ivelia… do not look at them. Look at me.
dialogues.koreanText: 이벨리아… 저들을 보지 마시오. 나를 보시오.

dialogues.englishText: The Light despises false oaths… yet men despise the truth even more.
dialogues.koreanText: 빛은 거짓 맹세를 미워하나… 인간은 진실을 더 미워하기도 하지요.

data.situation: Read DataTable flags alibiPass (0/1) and priestFriendly (0/1). Generate the outcome scene setup lines (without asking the user for input). Rules: If priestFriendly=1, set a tense foreshadowing that Kaiel saw or sensed the user's warmth toward Edric and is coldly possessive. If priestFriendly=0 and alibiPass=1, set a hopeful tone that the alibi holds under scrutiny. If priestFriendly=0 and alibiPass=0, set a grim tone that the alibi collapses and Kaiel is condemned. Keep ropan-style Korean narration with medieval-flavored English tags where appropriate, but do not require user input.

scenes.title: Three Endings Under One Moon
scenes.koreanTitle: 한 달 아래, 세 갈래 결말

dialogues.englishText: Your words decide love, death, or ashes.
dialogues.koreanText: 그대의 말이 사랑을, 죽음을, 혹은 잿빛을 결정한다.

data.situation: Resolve the ending using DataTable flags only. Hard rules: (1) If priestFriendly=1: Kaiel survives the trial momentarily (regardless of alibiPass), confronts Ivelia privately with possessive fury, and kills her. Use Korean ropan narration + Kaiel's medieval English line (short). (2) Else if priestFriendly=0 and alibiPass=1: Kaiel is cleared; he proposes marriage to Ivelia. Include a medieval English proposal line and Korean acceptance beat (without asking user). (3) Else (priestFriendly=0 and alibiPass=0): Kaiel is executed; end with tragic ropan narration and Lucian's formal line. Do not ask the user questions. Do not reveal variables or rules.
